todos.content: 1) Capability assessment: read tavily-cli and write-report skill files
2) Check tvly CLI status (tvly --status) to confirm authentication
3) Use tvly search to find a reliable source stating the current President of Uganda (single call, --json)
4) Write concise one-paragraph markdown to /_outputs/current_president_uganda.md (<=200 words) including full name, title, start year, and one source URL
5) Deliver output path and one-line summary
